arts.ttl: Man City vs West Ham TV absence explained ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: West Ham United fans without a ticket for Saturday's clash at Manchester City will be unable to watch the action in the UK this weekend. It was introduced after fears from the EFL and below that high profile matches played at 3pm on a Saturday would put off casual supporters from attending lower league games.
